spring_light.name: Spring Light
spring_light.description: Bright, clear pastel warm tones suit you best. We recommend light and radiant colors.

spring_bright.name: Spring Bright
spring_bright.description: Vivid, vibrant warm tones suit you best. We recommend lively, energetic colors.

spring_true.name: Spring True
spring_true.description: Warm, clear medium tones suit you best. We recommend natural, healthy-looking colors.

summer_light.name: Summer Light
summer_light.description: Bright, soft pastel cool tones suit you. We recommend elegant and feminine colors.

summer_muted.name: Summer Muted
summer_muted.description: Calm, greyish tones suit you. We recommend sophisticated and dignified colors.

summer_true.name: Summer True
summer_true.description: Cool, soft medium cool tones suit you. We recommend refreshing and clean colors.

autumn_soft.name: Autumn Soft
autumn_soft.description: Soft, warm muted tones suit you. We recommend natural and comfortable colors.

autumn_deep.name: Autumn Deep
autumn_deep.description: Deep, rich earth tones suit you. We recommend luxurious and profound colors.

autumn_true.name: Autumn True
autumn_true.description: Warm, natural earth tones suit you. We recommend classic and stable colors.

winter_bright.name: Winter Bright
winter_bright.description: Vivid, cool bold tones suit you. We recommend intense, eye-catching colors.

winter_deep.name: Winter Deep
winter_deep.description: Deep, dark tones suit you. We recommend chic and sophisticated colors.

winter_true.name: Winter True
winter_true.description: Cool, vivid high-contrast colors suit you. We recommend modern and urban colors.

questions.question: What color are the veins on the inside of your wrist?
How does your skin react to sunlight?
Which accessories suit you better — gold or silver?
When wearing white, which shade suits you more?
What color are your eyes and hair?
What is your overall image or impression?
Which suits you better — vivid primary colors or calm muted colors?
How much contrast is there in your features? (between eyes, hair, and skin)

spring_warm.name: Spring Warm
spring_warm.description: Warm, bright colors suit you best. We recommend radiant colors like peach, coral, light orange, and soft yellow.

summer_cool.name: Summer Cool
summer_cool.description: Cool, soft colors suit you best. We recommend pastel cool tones like lavender, rose, sky blue, and mint.

autumn_warm.name: Autumn Warm
autumn_warm.description: Warm, deep colors suit you best. We recommend autumnal colors like camel, burgundy, olive, and mustard.

winter_cool.name: Winter Cool
winter_cool.description: Cool, vivid colors suit you best. We recommend high-contrast colors like black, white, navy, and royal blue.
